content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
The main purpose of the content of this module is to provide concerned students with an essential background for establishing an adequate security policy within a digitalized institution (Equipped with a computer system). In other words, to protect system against threats that could disrupt it. These disruptions can be denial of service, theft of confidential data, etc. Therefore, the so-called policy must be strongly related to the importance of the stakes involved in the institution
